request: Create a sales dashboard with total revenue, top 10 customers by order count, and monthly order trends

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Order Count
sql_queries.description: Top 10 customers based on the number of orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CompanyName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od
